John Ocasio-Rodham Nolte (@NolteNC)

The time is now…

It was never about keeping religion out of politics.

It was about replacing Christianity with other religions. Leftism is a hatred and rejection of Christianity.


Ariana Jasmine (@arianajasmine__)

Breaking our iftaar fast with mayor Mamdani at city hall






— https://nitter.net/arianajasmine__/status/2031567323862061400#m

It’s pretty simple. 

Everything Trump is for — Democrats are against. Trump’s just playing the game at higher stakes. And it’s been pretty humiliating for Libs.


Jesse Watters (@JesseBWatters)

NEW: @BennyJohnson says Trump is playing a GAME of “I KNOW YOU ARE, BUT WHAT AM I?” with the DEMOCRATS 🚨

“They LOSE EVERY SINGLE ROUND, ding, ding, ding, ding” 🥊

“Here we are killing the Ayatollah, somebody who has caused enormous amounts of horror — and Democrats are AGAINST THAT” 🤦

“I'm just surpri

NEW: @BennyJohnson says Trump is playing a GAME of “I KNOW YOU ARE, BUT WHAT AM I?” with the DEMOCRATS 🚨

“They LOSE EVERY SINGLE ROUND, ding, ding, ding, ding” 🥊

“Here we are killing the Ayatollah, somebody who has caused enormous amounts of horror — and Democrats are AGAINST THAT” 🤦

“I'm just surprised, that a LEFT-WING federal judge hasn't ruled that the Ayatollah is still in charge of Iran and alive” 🤣

Video

It’s just sad how Democrats are rooting for the cardboard cut out in Iran @bennyjohnson

Video

Senator John Fetterman (D-PA): “We all have to acknowledge that this shutdown had no impact, zero impact on ICE, all of the funding was already in place there.”

Fund DHS. Pay all the TSA workers who’ve been working without pay. The shutdown does no good.

Video
Coming up LIVE with @JesseBWatters on @FoxNews

President Trump ends his Kentucky speech with the moves the American people love!

Video

Jake Paul: “What President Trump’s taught me is courage. You never back down from a fight.”
 
Trump: “I’m going to make a prediction that you will be, in the not too distant future, running for political office. You have my complete and total endorsement!”

Video

President Trump on the SAVE America Act: “And then I added two things. We call them ‘best of.’ You know what they are? ‘Best of Trump.’ No men in women’s sports. And no transgender mutilization surgery for our children.”

It’s all common sense—pass it now!

Video

Kentucky bartender praises POTUS for what his tax cut means for her: 

“This year, due to our President’s No Taxes on Tips and Overtime policy, I got more in taxes back than I ever have, which has helped me get that much closer to my American Dream.”

🇺🇸

Video

President Trump: “One of the greatest victories we’ve achieved for hardworking Americans with the help of our great Republican majorities… is No Tax on Tips, No Tax on Social Security, and… No Tax on Overtime... and every Democrat voted against it.”

Video

President Trump in Kentucky:

“Operation Epic Fury! Is that a great name? Well, it’s only good if you win — and we’ve WON!”

"Sir, pick the name!… The name of the attack on Iran. They gave me 20 names… Then I see: EPIC. FURY. I said, I like that name!”

Video

President Trump on the SAVE America Act: “We want Voter ID, we want proof of citizenship... no men playing in women’s sports... no transgender mutilation of our children — very basic things that you wouldn’t even think we’d be talking about 15 years ago.”

Video
Six months. And still, Charlie’s vision challenges us to think bigger, stand taller, and fight harder for the country he loved.

Sen. Murkowski (R-AK) says she WON’T support the SAVE America Act as it is since it’d “disenfranchise an extraordinary majority” of rural Alaskans.

She added, “While I support citizenship voting and voter ID, I want to make sure that it’s implementable.”

Video

FBI has warned some California police departments that Iran is looking at possibly launching drone attacks at the West Coast as retaliation, according to an alert received and reviewed by ABC News.

Video

We have way too many RINOs in the Senate. 

These people campaign like they are MAGA but then get up to DC and vote with Democrats. 

If we don’t start nominating ACTUALLY CONSERVATIVE patriots who love this country, we might as well just elect Democrats.

@bennyjohnson

Video

American in Illinois is in tears describing the terror his family faced being caught in the recent tornado.

Tornado survivor Jim Horchem is one of countless Americans being put at risk by congressional Democrats defunding FEMA.

Video

President Trump on Iran: “We have hit them harder than virtually any country in history has been hit, and we’re not finished yet.”

Video
